app.name: Diary
app.tagline: Your personal space for thoughts, people and memories

update.needsInstall: Update v{{version}} needs a new app install

dailyReminderBodies: Today is still blank. Rude, considering everything that happened.
Your diary is gathering dust. One sentence fixes that.
Somewhere, a future you is hoping you wrote this down.
A totally empty page is looking at you right now.
Quick reminder: today doesn't write itself.
Five minutes from now, you could have a diary entry instead of this notification.
Your streak is counting on you. No pressure.
Nothing's in today's entry yet. Even 'nothing happened' counts.
birthdayBodies: {{name}} only turns this age once. Probably a good moment to say hi.
Cake, candles, {{name}} — today has all three. Join in.
One message from you could make {{name}}'s whole day.
{{name}} is expecting confetti emojis at minimum.
It's {{name}}'s big day. Don't be the friend who forgot.
Drop {{name}} a happy birthday before someone else beats you to it.

descriptions.1: Life-changing events like getting married, a new job, moving abroad
descriptions.2: Memorable personal developments, experiences and achievements
descriptions.3: Meaningful moments and solid milestones that make a week special
descriptions.4: Deviations from the norm, practical skill-building or small goals

diary.title: Diary
diary.noEntriesDescription: Start writing your thoughts for this day
diary.willBeSaidTo: Will be marked as said to
diary.deleteConfirmDescription: This will also delete its sub-entries. This cannot be undone.

people.title: People
people.name: Name
people.tagsDescription: Entries sharing these tags become talking points for this person
people.noPeopleDescription: Add the people you talk to and the diary will suggest what to tell them.
people.noTalkingPointsDescription: New entries that mention {{name}} or share their tags will appear here.
people.noMemoriesDescription: Important entries that mention {{name}} will resurface here after {{months}} months.
people.deleteConfirmDescription: Entries will be kept, but every mention, said-mark and hidden-mark of this person will be removed.
people.duplicate_name: A person with that name already exists
people.checkupRemindersDescription: Get an alert on this person's profile when it's been a while since you last talked.
people.checkupDueDescription: It's been a while since you last marked something as said to them.
checkupBodies: It's been {{days}} days since you last talked to {{name}}. They might be starting to think you don't love them anymore.
{{name}} hasn't heard from you in {{days}} days. Time to prove you're not a ghost.
Plot twist: {{name}} still exists, and it's been {{days}} days since you checked in.
Breaking news: {{name}} is still waiting for you to say hi. It's been {{days}} days.
Your friendship with {{name}} isn't extinct yet, but it's been {{days}} days. Go water it.
{{name}} called. Just kidding, they didn't, because it's been {{days}} days since you reached out first.
Gentle nudge: {{name}} is a real person who exists outside your notifications. {{days}} days and counting.
It's been {{days}} days. {{name}} is starting to suspect they've been replaced by a Tamagotchi you forgot to feed.
Friendly reminder: {{name}} misses you, or at least you should assume so after {{days}} days of silence.
{{days}} days of radio silence with {{name}}. Send a meme, a hello, anything.
Achievement unlocked: {{days}} days without talking to {{name}}. Please don't go for the next tier.
{{name}} is patiently waiting. It's been {{days}} days — maybe say something before it becomes a milestone.
people.phoneIncomplete: Not in international format — add the country code so WhatsApp and calls work.
people.wechatQrDescription: Scan this from your phone to get the ID, then paste it into WeChat's search. WeChat does not allow opening a chat directly from a link.
people.aliasesDescription: Nicknames this person also answers to. Used by @mentions and voice dictation.
people.birthdayYearOptional: The year is optional — leave it blank if you don't know it.
people.wechatCopiedHint: WeChat ID copied — paste it into WeChat's search to open the chat.
people.wechatSearchHint: Search for {{id}} in WeChat to open the chat.
people.eventTitlePlaceholder: Trip to Lisbon, driving test, surgery…
people.eventEndHint: Leave the end date blank for a single-day event.
people.eventEndBeforeStart: The end date cannot be before the start date.
people.eventNotesPlaceholder: Anything worth remembering to ask about…
people.noEventsDescription: Add things that happen to {{name}} and the diary will remind you to ask how they went.
people.eventFollowUpDescription: These finished recently — ask {{name}} how they went.
people.eventDeleteConfirmDescription: This removes the event and its reminder. It cannot be undone.

tags.title: Tags
tags.name: Name
tags.noTagsDescription: Tags connect entries to people. Create a few to get started.
tags.deleteConfirmDescription: It will be removed from all entries and people that use it.
tags.duplicate_name: A tag with that name already exists

search.title: Search
search.noResultsDescription: Try different words or fewer filters.

settings.title: Settings

decay.title: Talking point decay
decay.description: How long entries of each importance stay relevant as talking points. The value is a half-life in days: after that many days an entry has half its initial score, and it disappears once the score falls below the cutoff.

memories.title: Memories
memories.description: Entries that directly mention a person come back as shared memories once they are old enough.
memories.thresholdDescription: Only entries at this importance or higher become memories

broadcast.title: Broadcast to everyone
broadcast.description: Some entries can be suggested as talking points for every person, not just those they mention or share a tag with.
broadcast.lifeChangingDescription: Suggest every "Life-changing" entry to everyone, regardless of match.
broadcast.tagsDescription: Entries with these tags are suggested to everyone regardless of match.

checkups.title: Checkup reminders
checkups.description: Default checkup interval inherited by newly created people. Each person can override or disable it from their profile.

ai.title: AI assistant
ai.description: Record a voice note and let AI turn it into diary entry suggestions you can review before saving. Groq is required for transcription; adding an OpenRouter or Cerebras key switches the suggestion step to a stronger model instead of Groq's.
ai.signInRequired: Sign in to use AI features — voice transcription and suggestions run on the server.
ai.apiKeyHint: Required for voice transcription. Free to get, used only to call Groq directly from this device. Get one at
ai.forceEnglishAIEvents: Force AI dictation suggestions to English
ai.forceEnglishAIEventsDescription: When enabled, entries created from voice dictation are written in English even if you speak another language.
ai.openRouterApiKeyHint: When set, used instead of Groq to turn transcripts into entry suggestions. Free to get, used only to call OpenRouter directly from this device. Get one at
ai.cerebrasApiKeyHint: When set, used instead of Groq to turn transcripts into entry suggestions. Free to get, used only to call Cerebras directly from this device. Get one at

settings.accountLocalOnlyDescription: Your data stays on this device only. Sign in to back it up and sync across devices.

data.title: Data
data.description: Back up everything to a file, restore from a previous backup, or export part of your diary as Markdown for an AI agent to analyze.
data.invalidFile: That file isn't a valid backup
data.exportMarkdownDescription: Export entries or a person's briefing as a Markdown file, for pasting into an AI agent.

markdownExport.title: Export as Markdown
markdownExport.description: Choose what to include — the file is meant to be handed to an AI agent, not read as a backup.

option.saidTimeline: Timeline of what's been said to them
option.unsaidCount: Count of things not yet said

crash.title: Something went wrong
crash.description: The app hit an unexpected error. Your entries are safe on this device.

person.duplicate_name: A person with that name already exists

tag.duplicate_name: A tag with that name already exists

ai.reviewDescription: Edit or remove anything before adding these to your diary.
ai.empty: Nothing to suggest from that recording
ai.invalid_key: Your LLM API key looks invalid
ai.rate_limited: LLM rate limit reached, try again shortly
ai.timeout: The LLM took too long to respond
ai.no_key: Add a Groq API key in settings first
ai.no_submission: Couldn't get a result from the assistant
ai.signInRequiredForVoice: Sign in to use voice entries.

import.title: Import from contacts
import.nativeOnly: Contacts can only be imported from the Android app.
import.noPermissionDescription: Grant the contacts permission in system settings to import people from your address book.
import.summaryNew: {{count}} contact will be added as a new person.
import.summaryNew_other: {{count}} contacts will be added as new people.
import.conflictDuplicate: “{{name}}” already exists. Two people can’t share a name.
import.conflictContainment: Looks similar to “{{name}}” — they might be the same person.

importBackup.title: Import backup
importBackup.noFileDescription: Go back to Settings and choose a backup file to import.
importBackup.conflictDuplicate: “{{name}}” already exists. Two can’t share a name.
importBackup.conflictContainment: Looks similar to “{{name}}” — might be the same person.
importBackup.done: Tags: {{tagsCreated}} added, {{tagsMerged}} merged. People: {{peopleCreated}} added, {{peopleMerged}} merged. Entries: {{entriesCreated}} added, {{entriesMerged}} overwritten.
importBackup.orphaned: {{count}} entry moved to the top level because its parent wasn't imported.
importBackup.orphaned_other: {{count}} entries moved to the top level because their parent wasn't imported.
